category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/chainguard-dev/melange says Melange builds apk packages using declarative pipelines.
source_facts.description says "Build APKs from source code".
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use the name melange.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to detailed documentation in the repository docs directory.
Official repository docs directory contains build-file, build-process, pipeline, testing, and related documentation files.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/chainguard-dev/melange; per instruction repo returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official README describes declarative build pipelines, APK packages, apko usage, and secure software factory use cases.
source_facts.description and package metadata identify APK package building.
